ingredients.name_it: Arac (o cognac o simili) vero e fino
ingredients.name_en: Arack (or cognac or similar) genuine and fine

ingredients.note: to prevent crystal separation; or 6–8 g

steps_en: Dissolve the sugar in approximately 1.5 litres of water, heating to boiling to obtain 4 litres of syrup.
Add 6–8 grams of pure citric acid to prevent separation of crystals.
Allow the mass to cool almost completely.
Gradually add the arack and alcohol, stirring constantly to combine.
notes_en: For a finer extract, use the best quality arack, cognac, or rum and superior-quality ingredients. The genuine arack may be replaced with an aromatic imitation product composed of: 940 g arack extract, 10 g vanilla extract, and 50 g genuine arack.

ingredients.note: Columns II–VIII; Column I shows litres (—) implying 0 or special handling

notes_en: Table of proportions for eight variants (Columns I–VIII) of grog extract formulations. The table is preserved as presented; exact interpretation of Column I requires verification against source image.

Zucchero Column I '12 Vt 13' read as 12.5; confirm against image
